strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development across multiple technologies
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling

concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI strategy and cloud technologies

response.justification: The candidate has relevant technical skills and entrepreneurial experience, but lacks direct experience in AI strategy and cloud technologies.
